parameters.query:
WITH phone_input AS (
  SELECT $1::varchar AS phone
),
usuario AS (
  SELECT u.*
  FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.usuarios u
  WHERE u.telefone = (SELECT phone FROM phone_input)
  LIMIT 1
),
paciente AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.pacientes p
  WHERE p.telefone = (SELECT phone FROM phone_input)
     OR p.telefone_secundario = (SELECT phone FROM phone_input)
     OR (p.usuario_id IS NOT NULL AND p.usuario_id = (SELECT id FROM usuario))
  ORDER BY p.atualizado_em DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
),
aggr_agendamentos AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS total_agendamentos,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.status IN ('agendado', 'confirmado') AND a.data_consulta >= CURRENT_DATE)::int AS total_agendamentos_futuros,
    MIN((a.data_consulta::text || ' ' || a.hora_consulta::text)::timestamp) FILTER (WHERE a.status IN ('agendado', 'confirmado') AND a.data_consulta >= CURRENT_DATE) AS proximo_agendamento,
    MAX((a.data_consulta::text || ' ' || a.hora_consulta::text)::timestamp) FILTER (WHERE a.data_consulta <= CURRENT_DATE) AS ultima_consulta
  FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.agendamentos a
  WHERE a.id_paciente = (SELECT id FROM paciente)
),
aggr_planos AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS total_planos_tratamento,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pt.status IN ('proposto', 'aprovado', 'em_andamento'))::int AS planos_ativos
  FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.planos_tratamento pt
  WHERE pt.id_paciente = (SELECT id FROM paciente)
),
aggr_prontuarios AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS total_prontuarios,
    MAX(pr.data_registro)::date AS ultimo_prontuario_em
  FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.prontuarios pr
  WHERE pr.id_paciente = (SELECT id FROM paciente)
),
aggr_prescricoes AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS total_prescricoes,
    MAX(ps.data_prescricao)::date AS prescricao_mais_recente
  FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.prescricoes ps
  WHERE ps.id_paciente = (SELECT id FROM paciente)
),
aggr_financeiro AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS total_registros_financeiros,
    COALESCE(SUM(rf.valor) FILTER (WHERE rf.status = 'pago'), 0)::numeric(10,2) AS total_pago,
    COALESCE(SUM(rf.valor) FILTER (WHERE rf.status = 'pendente'), 0)::numeric(10,2) AS total_pendente,
    COALESCE(SUM(rf.valor) FILTER (WHERE rf.status = 'atrasado'), 0)::numeric(10,2) AS total_atrasado,
    MIN(rf.data_vencimento) FILTER (WHERE rf.status IN ('pendente', 'atrasado'))::date AS proximo_vencimento
  FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.registros_financeiros rf
  WHERE rf.id_paciente = (SELECT id FROM paciente)
)
SELECT
  (SELECT phone FROM phone_input) AS telefone_consulta,
  u.id AS usuario_id,
  u.nome AS usuario_nome,
  u.email AS usuario_email,
  u.primeira_interacao,
  u.ultima_interacao,
  u.total_interacoes,
  u.metadados AS usuario_metadados,
  p.id AS paciente_id,
  p.nome AS paciente_nome,
  p.data_nascimento,
  p.convenio,
  p.alergias,
  p.condicoes_medicas,
  p.observacoes AS observacoes_paciente,
  aa.total_agendamentos,
  aa.total_agendamentos_futuros,
  aa.proximo_agendamento,
  aa.ultima_consulta,
  ap.total_planos_tratamento,
  ap.planos_ativos,
  apr.total_prontuarios,
  apr.ultimo_prontuario_em,
  aps.total_prescricoes,
  aps.prescricao_mais_recente,
  af.total_registros_financeiros,
  af.total_pago,
  af.total_pendente,
  af.total_atrasado,
  af.proximo_vencimento
FROM usuario u
FULL OUTER JOIN paciente p ON true
LEFT JOIN aggr_agendamentos aa ON true
LEFT JOIN aggr_planos ap ON true
LEFT JOIN aggr_prontuarios apr ON true
LEFT JOIN aggr_prescricoes aps ON true
LEFT JOIN aggr_financeiro af ON true
LIMIT 1;
